'''Wallen''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtrooper]] who held the rank of [[Sergeant/Legends|sergeant]], and was assigned to [[Colonel/Legends|Colonel]] [[Dyer/Legends|Dyer's]] command on the [[Endor/Legends|Forest Moon of Endor]] in [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]] during the construction of the [[Death Star II/Legends|second Death Star]] prior to the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]]. [[Governor/Legends|Governor]] [[Yount]] of the [[Wakeelmui]] [[Garrison/Legends|garrison]] recommended his unit to [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Igar/Legends|Igar]] of the [[Imperial Army/Legends|Imperial Army]] [[Legion/Legends|unit]] [[Tempest Force/Legends|Tempest Force]]. Wallen and another stormtrooper were present in a landing station on the moon when Commander Igar brought [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] Commander [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] to [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Dark Lord of the Sith]] [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] during the early stages of the Battle of Endor. After a conversation between Vader and Skywalker, Wallen escorted the Rebel to Vader's [[Lambda-class T-4a shuttle/Legends|''Lambda''-class shuttle]] [[ST 321/Legends|ST 321]], bound for the [[Orbit/Legends|orbiting]] [[Death Star/Legends|Death Star]].

==Biography==
The [[Human/Legends|Human]]<ref name="CVD" /> [[Sergeant/Legends|Sergeant]] Wallen was among the [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]] under the command of [[Colonel/Legends|Colonel]] [[Dyer/Legends|Dyer]]<ref name="CCG" /> who were stationed on the [[Endor/Legends|Forest Moon of Endor]] during the construction of the [[Orbit/Legends|orbiting]] [[Death Star II/Legends|second Death Star]]<ref name="ROTJ" /> in the [[Standard year/Legends|year]] [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]].<ref name="NEC">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' dates the events of [[Star Wars: Episode VI Return of the Jedi|''Star Wars'': Episode VI ''Return of the Jedi'']] to [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]].</ref> His unit was recommended to [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Igar/Legends|Igar]]<ref name="CCG" /> of the [[Imperial Army/Legends|Imperial Army]] [[Legion/Legends|unit]] [[Tempest Force/Legends|Tempest Force]]<ref name="Tempest Force CSWE">{{CSWECite|III|230|Tempest Force}}</ref> by [[Governor/Legends|Governor]] [[Yount]] of the [[Wakeelmui]] [[Garrison/Legends|garrison]].<ref name="CCG" />

[[File:WallenAndLuke.png|thumb|right|300px|Wallen and another stormtrooper escorting Luke Skywalker into a lift.]]
During the early stages of the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], Wallen and another stormtrooper were present at a landing station on the moon when [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Dark Lord of the Sith]] [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] arrived from his [[Lambda-class T-4a shuttle/Legends|''Lambda''-class shuttle]] [[ST 321/Legends|ST 321]]. The pair of [[Trooper/Legends|troopers]] accompanied [[Darth/Legends|Darth]] Vader down a [[Turbolift/Legends|turbolift]], and waited inside the lift as the Dark [[Lord/Legends|Lord]] went to meet Commander Igar, who brought recently captured [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] Commander and [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] to Lord Vader. After a conversation between the Dark Lord and the Rebel, Vader motioned for Wallen and the other trooper to escort Skywalker into the lift and bring the [[Prisoner/Legends|captive]] to the [[Shuttle/Legends|shuttle]], which then brought both the Dark Lord and the Rebel to the [[Death Star/Legends|Death Star]].<ref name="ROTJ">{{Film|VI}}</ref>

==Equipment==
Wallen wore full [[Color/Legends|white]] [[Stormtrooper armor/Legends|stormtrooper armor]]. He wielded a standard [[E-11 blaster rifle/Legends|E-11 blaster rifle]].<ref name="ROTJ" />

==Behind the scenes==
Wallen first appeared as an unnamed character in the [[Star Wars: Return of the Jedi (novelization)|''Return of the Jedi'' novel]]<ref name="ROTJnovel">[[Star Wars: Return of the Jedi (novelization)|''Star Wars Episode VI: Return of the Jedi'' novelization]]</ref> and the film [[Star Wars: Episode VI Return of the Jedi|''Star Wars'': Episode VI ''Return of the Jedi'']], in which an unidentified extra portrayed his character.<ref name="ROTJ" /> He was given a name and brief backstory in the [[1999]] ''[[Endor Limited]]'' edition of the [[Star Wars Customizable Card Game|''Star Wars'' Customizable Card Game]].<ref name="CCG" />
